a: Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Meet, Google Calendar)

c.d: Includes features for real-time messaging, audio/video conferencing, and file sharing to facilitate seamless team communication.
Offers tools for task management, project planning, progress tracking, and deadline management to ensure projects are completed efficiently and on time.
Enables real-time co-editing, version control, and document sharing, streamlining the collaborative creation and management of documents.
Seamlessly integrates with other business applications such as CRM systems, email, and file storage solutions to enhance workflow efficiency.
Features an intuitive and user-friendly interface that makes it easy for team members to adopt and use the tool effectively.
